title: ToolTreaux 24pc Reusable Food Grade Silicone Zip Ties for Cable Management
description:
From cable management and food storage to school supplies and pantry organization, ToolTreaux’s 24 pack of food grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove handy to have around the house, home office, workplace, or garage for a multitude of tasks. And, the best part? The zip ties are totally reusable! Home offices, living room media centers, workshops, labs—these spaces, especially if cables are involved, can get messy fast! ToolTreaux 24pc Reusable Food Grade Silicone Zip Ties for Cable Management

From cable management and food storage to school supplies and pantry organization, ToolTreaux’s 24 pack of food grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove handy to have around the house, home office, workplace, or garage for a multitude of tasks. And, the best part? The zip ties are totally reusable!

Key Features

  • REUSABLE MULTIPURPOSE TOOL: From cable management and food storage to school supplies and pantry organization, ToolTreaux’s 24 pack of kitchen grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove handy to have around the house, home office, workplace or garage for a multitude of tasks; And, they’re reusable!
  • CORD & CABLE MANAGEMENT: Our bag of assorted silicone twist ties will work on virtually any cable! Whether it be an HDMI cable, basic power cords or an extension cord, these zip ties are made to keep your cables safe and organized, helping you achieve a clutter-free office or workspace
  • SEAL FOOD BAGS: Another use for our multipurpose silicone ties is to properly seal a variety of bags in your home; Our cable ties ensure you get the most out of your bread, keep pantry items fresh and will even keep your garbage bags sealed, ensuring a neat and tidy, organized kitchen, fridge, freezer, pantry and much more
  • FOOD PREP: A unique aspect of these silicone twist ties is that the twist ties are food grade approved, meaning you can use our multifunctional zip ties to blanch vegetables or seal food; utilizing these zip straps can help keep food items fresh
  • HANG ACCESSORIES: These zip ties are notably strong and very durable; because of this, the twist ties can be used to hang a wide variety of items such as lanterns, or attach water bottles to a hiking backpack; a perfect tool to accompany you on family camping trips or trekking adventures

Product Specifications

  • MPN: RESIL24
  • UPC: 810058481399
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: 4.25 in

Home offices, living room media centers, workshops, labs—these spaces, especially if cables are involved, can get messy fast! Whether it’s tripping over an extension cord, or getting your HDMI cable tangled, you need a cable management tool set to clear up space and make your space more organized. ToolTreaux’s environmentally friendly zip ties are the perfect tools for cord organization and cable management. You’ll be amazed at how much room you’ll save by using our twist ties to organize your messy entertainment set or home office. That’s how ToolTreaux’s reusable, multi-color cable ties are creating neater, more efficient rooms, one home, office or workplace at a time.

Now, we did say multipurpose; next stop: food prep and organization. The twist ties, zip ties or straps are made of high-temperature resistant silicone, which means that they are completely safe to use when preparing food in the kitchen (food grade). Even better, the multipurpose cable ties are reusable so you can use them to keep coffee fresh, blanch vegetables or organize your pantry.

Our 24-piece tool set of reusable silicone zip ties will last long in to the future and make your life more convenient and organized! However small or large your organizational project may be, be sure to have a pack of these twist ties on hand and you’ll be well on your way to a neat, tidy, clutter-free and organized space!
